about_mission_text: We aim to simplify kitchen management through technology.
about_team_subtitle: A collective of visionaries, engineers, and designers dedicated to redefining the digital culinary landscape.

about_hero_desc: Kapan Beli is more than just a list. It is a smart ecosystem designed to harmonize your culinary life, reduce waste, and bring back joy to the heart of your home.
about_what_is_desc1: Kapan Beli is a smart kitchen stock management platform that helps you track every ingredient with precision. We believe that an organized kitchen is the key to a healthy and efficient lifestyle.
about_what_is_desc2: Forget the moments when you run out of spices in the middle of cooking or throw away expired ingredients. Our smart system monitors everything for you.
about_feat_inv_desc: Monitor kitchen stock in real-time with an intuitive interface.
about_feat_alert_desc: Get instant notifications before your favorite ingredients run out or expire.
about_feat_list_desc: Automatically generate shopping lists based on your stock needs.
about_vision_desc: To become the number one digital kitchen ecosystem in Indonesia that inspires household sustainability and efficiency.
about_mission_li3: Empowering everyone to cook with peace of mind.
about_tech_desc: Built with the latest technology to ensure high speed, security, and scalability.
